description_long: This house features a simple rectangular structure with a prominent, steeply pitched gable roof in a light gray color. The front facade includes a central wooden door flanked by two sets of double-paned windows with brown frames, providing a balanced and symmetrical appearance. The side views reveal the depth of the roof overhang and additional windows, while the rear view shows a single set of windows, indicating a straightforward, functional layout. The exterior walls are smooth and light-colored, likely finished with plaster or painted concrete. The roof extends well beyond the walls, offering protection from the elements and contributing to the traditional, practical design. The overall style is modest and unornamented, suitable for suburban or rural neighborhoods.
description: A modest, rectangular house with a steep gable roof, symmetrical window placement, and a central wooden door. The exterior is light-colored with brown-framed windows and a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central wooden door and two sets of double windows on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steep gable roof and a single set of windows on the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single set of double windows and the extended roof overhang.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two sets of double windows and the pronounced gable roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Central wooden door with no porch or steps, flanked by windows and sheltered by the roof overhang.
